name: Metal Beech Rust and UV-Resistant Outdoor Patio Coffee Table Matte Black - Threshold™
description:
This Beech Patio Coffee Table from Threshold™ effortlessly upgrades your favorite outdoor space. The stylish patio table has a rectangular silhouette and measures 35 inches long, making it ideal for everyday entertaining. The rust- and UV-resistant all-weather construction promotes lasting outdoor use no matter the season, and the matte black color will pair well with any existing patio decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
